div.h1: Naive Matrix Multiplication: Access Pattern Analysis

p.em: Demonstrating Spatial Locality vs. Cache Striding

ul.li: Prefetcher Behavior: Next cache line requested before needed.
Prefetcher Behavior: Triggers many page-boundary requests.
Each access jumps far past the current Cache Line.
Every element (k=0, 1, 2...) is a NEW Cache Miss.

p.em: Requires K loads from A and K loads from B.

g.text: 1 Load = 1 float. Utilization: 6.25% (Remaining 60B evicted before use)
